task_updates.executor_notes: Added scripted editorial-polish loop integrations without response post-processing. Covered search_in_body -> get_epic -> edit_epic ordering, exact scripted show-changes reply text, edit_epic diff retention in tool-call audit records, render_epic for "Show me the epic", explicit feedback save with default acknowledgment, proposed-user-confirmed feedback save and hot-context reload, apply_feedback last_applied_at reload, and observation record/reload/resolution lifecycle. Targeted verification passed. Full python -m pytest still fails only on the known historical secret-scan failure.
